subject: FW: Jeffrey trip in Paris
body:
-----Original Message-----
From: audrey@gmiproductions.com [mailto:audrey@gmiproductions.com] 
Sent: Tuesday, October 02, 2007 4:03 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Jeffrey trip in Paris
Importance: High

Hi Lesley,

I have spoken with Jeffrey yesterday, can you please confirm to me,when
you will know about Jeffrey's trip to Europe.Please let him know that it
would be much more convenient for me to see him next week and that I
really hope to see him in Paris or London...
Also can you please let him know that I have never been as serious as
yesterday... and I have now a big smile on my face because I am happy I
could tell him my secret...

Thanks Lesley,
Kind regards,
Audrey
Audrey Raimbaut
Founder President
GMI Productions
1st Floor
12 Curzon Street, off Queen Street
London W1J 5HL
tel: +44 203 214 1005
Fax: +44 203 214 1001
www.gmiproductions.com
